x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Field agent mobile app adoption determines whether Now Assist FSM AI features reach agents in the field.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all field agents have the fsm_agent or wm_agent role assigned and are active users. Drive FSM mobile app adoption. Enable Now Assist features in the FSM mobile app. Target: 10+ active field agents.
